title: Protocol for mapping T cell activation using single-cell RNA-seq (R code)
author: Li, Hui
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This repository hosts a computational pipeline for processing and analyzing scRNA-seq data from “DB1” (data generated by our protocol) and “DB2” (datasets from Ding et al., 2017) using Seurat v3.0.       The code includes integration of both datasets, normalization, dimensionality reduction, cell clustering, and downstream analyses.
steps_raw: This repository hosts a computational pipeline for processing and analyzing scRNA-seq data from “DB1” (data generated by our protocol) and “DB2” (datasets from Ding et al., 2017) using Seurat v3.0.       The code includes integration of both datasets, normalization, dimensionality reduction, cell clustering, and downstream analyses.
